summary: Boncos Iteration 2 testing complete. Backend: 10/10 tests passing (100%). Frontend: All new features working - multi-budget pots, inline expense form, quick buttons (no auto-submit), thousand separator, streak tracking, budget filters.

issues: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead. This is a React Native Web deprecation warning but doesn't affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend now supports multiple active budgets (not deactivating old ones)
✓ New DELETE /api/budgets/{budget_id} endpoint working correctly - deactivates budget and removes related expenses
✓ GET /api/budgets returns list of budgets with category and icon fields
✓ GET /api/dashboard accepts budget_id query param for specific pot
✓ POST /api/expenses records daily checkin for streak tracking
✓ GET /api/streak endpoint returns current_streak, longest_streak, today_logged, last_7_days
✓ Streak calculation logic correct - breaks on gaps, calculates longest streak
✓ Frontend inline expense form working - not modal
✓ Quick input buttons ADD to textbox, do NOT auto-submit (correct behavior)
✓ Thousand separator (dots) applied correctly in all numeric inputs
✓ apiFetch handles non-OK responses gracefully - returns error object instead of throwing
✓ Settings screen has multi-pot management with category picker
✓ Dashboard shows budget pot selector chips when multiple pots exist
✓ History screen shows budget filter chips and budget labels on expenses
✓ No uncaught promise errors or error popups
✓ All testID attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Created test user (frontend_test_v2@boncos.app) with session token and 2 budget pots (Makan & Jajan: 3M IDR, Transport: 500K IDR) for frontend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features working perfectly. Multi-budget pot system fully functional with category/icon support. Inline expense form with quick buttons working as expected (no auto-submit). Thousand separator applied correctly. Streak tracking working. No bugs found.

backend_test_details.budget_category_icon: PASS - Category and icon fields saved and returned correctly
backend_test_details.delete_budget: PASS - DELETE /api/budgets/{id} deactivates budget and removes related expenses

backend_test_details.streak_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/streak returns correct structure and data
backend_test_details.streak_calculation: PASS - Current streak, longest streak, and 7-day calendar calculated correctly
backend_test_details.streak_breaks: PASS - Streak breaks correctly when there's a gap in checkins

frontend_test_details.thousand_separator: PASS - Amount input displays with dots (50.000, 1.000.000)
frontend_test_details.quick_buttons_no_autosubmit: PASS - Quick buttons (+10k, +20k) ADD to textbox, do NOT auto-submit
frontend_test_details.quick_buttons_accumulate: PASS - Multiple quick button clicks accumulate (10k + 20k = 30k)
frontend_test_details.expense_submission: PASS - Expense saves correctly, form clears after submit
frontend_test_details.streak_section: PASS - Streak section visible on dashboard with fire emoji
frontend_test_details.settings_multi_pot: PASS - Settings shows existing pots with delete buttons
frontend_test_details.settings_category_picker: PASS - Category selector visible with icons (makan, transport, kopi, etc.)
frontend_test_details.settings_thousand_separator: PASS - Balance input in settings uses thousand separator
frontend_test_details.history_budget_filter: PASS - Budget filter chips visible (Semua Budget, Makan & Jajan, Transport)
frontend_test_details.history_budget_labels: PASS - Expense items show budget labels
frontend_test_details.no_uncaught_errors: PASS - No uncaught promise errors or error popups
frontend_test_details.tab_navigation: PASS - Navigation between Beranda, Riwayat, Pengaturan working

new_features_tested: Multi-budget pot system with category and icon
Quick buttons that ADD to textbox (not auto-submit)
Thousand separator (dots) in all numeric inputs
Budget pot selector chips on dashboard
Daily checkin recording on expense creation
Streak calculation with current/longest streak and 7-day calendar
rca_of_issue: N/A - No issues found. All features working as expected.
